title: Pour vivre heureux
overview: Challenging the burden of family traditions, the young Amel and Mashir live a secret and passionate love story. An arranged marriage between him and Amel’s new best friend will put their relationship in danger. Tearing apart social conventions seems to be the only way to stay together.

trailers.title: Bande annonce "Pour vivre heureux" de Salima Glamine et Dimitri Linder
